replenishment_policy.instruction: Add new todo tasks ONLY when the pool falls below minimum_todo_tasks. Before adding, scan existing done and blocked tasks — never recreate implemented features. Prefer stabilization, wiring, and test coverage over new trend modules. Read docs/trends.md for inspiration when replenishment is needed.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: Choose the first todo task that is not blocked by high/critical risk. If the first todo task is too large, create smaller prerequisite tasks and select the first prerequisite.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Never ask the user for the next task while safe low/medium-risk tasks can be generated from architecture docs, failing CI, TODO comments, or repeated errors.
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: If CI fails, prioritize a fix task for the failure before starting new features.
